chain.thought: Explanation: Dmitry Mikhailovich Golitsyn served from October 1761 to April 1792, which is about 30 years and 6 months. Andrey Kirillovich Razumovsky served from 5 October 1801 to 7 September 1806, which is about 4 years and 11 months. Therefore, Golitsyn served longer.

judge_thought: Explanation: Dmitry Mikhailovich Golitsyn served from October 1761 to April 1792, approximately 30 years and 6 months. Andrey Kirillovich Razumovsky served from 5 October 1801 to 7 September 1806, about 4 years and 11 months. Golitsyn’s term was significantly longer.
